message:
test(python): live-NumPy parity sweep for hermite wrappers

Pins parity for every numpy.polynomial.hermite passthrough in one
test. The 13 hermite wrapper pyfunctions themselves were swept into
another pane's earlier atomic landing during the stash/re-apply
round-trip forced by a concurrent worktree collision on fn average
and size_count; this commit adds the remaining coverage: arithmetic
triad across four shape cases, hermval at scalar/vector/2-D-coefs
with tensor=False, hermroots on quadratic/cubic/constant, hermfromroots
across 0/1/2/3 roots, hermpow including the maxpower ValueError
boundary, hermdiv's tuple return checked per-part, hermline across
three (off, scl) pairs, hermmulx vs hermmul([0, 1]) identity check,
hermtrim with default and positive tolerance, and hermder/hermint
across m=0..2 plus the every-kwarg chebint-mirror case, concluded by
a hermder(hermint(c)) round-trip parity check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
